fields.name: Employee No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number for the employee.

fields.name: Misc. Article Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code to define the type of miscellaneous article.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: When you register miscellaneous articles for an employee, the program automatically enters a line number in the Line No. field to keep track of all the different miscellaneous articles for the employee in the Misc. Article Information table. The line number is specific to the particular miscellaneous article.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the miscellaneous article.

fields.name: From Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the employee first received the miscellaneous article.

fields.name: To Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the employee no longer possesses the miscellaneous article.

fields.name: In Use
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the miscellaneous article is in use.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a comment is associated with this entry.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number of the miscellaneous article.
